notes.title: Maps of Thought

notes.title: Knowledge Graph
notes.content:
# Knowledge Graph

The graph reveals clusters, orphan notes, and unresolved links.

## Watch for
- Notes with many backlinks
- Ghost links that should become real notes
- How [[Projects Index]] and [[Writing Principles]] connect

notes.title: Writing Principles
notes.content:
# Writing Principles

## Keep notes useful
- Write clearly
- Prefer small connected notes
- Link to [[Projects Index]] when an idea becomes active

## Build context
- Summarize before expanding
- Connect back to [[Welcome to Obsidian Vault]]
- Capture sparks in [[Inbox]]

- Protect deep work using [[Deep Work Rituals]]
